aboutText: Second-year Computer Science student (BUT Informatique) at the IUT of Lille, I am passionate about web development with a strong preference for Back-End. While Front-End focuses on the visual side, I thrive on building the technical backbone and managing complex data flows. I enjoy solving algorithmic challenges, optimising queries, and ensuring every user interaction rests on solid server-side logic. Throughout my degree, I have built skills in Java, TypeScript, SQL, C, and web development, applied across a range of projects — from real-time multiplayer games to management applications and websites. My goal is to pursue a career in software or Back-End web development, ideally through a work-study programme or internship. Outside of coding, I am passionate about music (Metal above all, but I listen to everything) and I practice origami — anything from a few minutes to several hours depending on the model!
